steps.t: You should talk to Nabatínu when you are ready to begin the assault.
Your company has defeated the Ordâkhai defending the supply caravan. You should talk to Nabatínu about what to do next.
Nabatínu has given orders to everyone in your company. You should collect the supply crates.
You have collected the supply crates. You should talk to Rhadrog about what to do next.
